processes.title: Issuing Stock Parts
processes.description: Steps taken to issue parts to remedy a hardware issue for an end user compute asset from inventoried parts.
processes.usedWhen: Inventory parts are available and being assigned to an active repair.

processes.title: Issuing Received Parts
processes.description: Steps taken to issue parts to remedy a hardware issue for an end user compute asset.
processes.usedWhen: Inventory parts are not available and received parts are being assigned to an active repair.

processes.title: Special Handling: Warranty Parts Issued Ahead of Purchased Parts
processes.description: Guidance for issuing warranty parts ahead of purchased parts to avoid failure-to-return chargebacks.
processes.usedWhen: A case includes both warranty and purchased parts, warranty parts are available first, and delaying warranty repair would risk failure-to-return chargebacks.

processes.title: DOA Parts
processes.description: Occasionally parts provided for repairs are found to be defective or damaged. When this occurs, repair is paused and the manufacturer is engaged for replacement.
processes.usedWhen: A received or issued part is defective and requires replacement.

processes.title: Receiving Parts
processes.description: After orders are placed, replacement parts are received and either checked into inventory or staged for repair.
processes.usedWhen: Parts arrive from vendors and must be associated to a case, validated, and dispositioned correctly.

processes.title: Adding Parts To Inventory
processes.description: Steps taken to add parts to inventory.
processes.usedWhen: Replacement parts are received for cases repaired using inventory parts, inventory is being replenished, or parts are purchased specifically for inventory.

processes.title: Shipping/Disposing Parts
processes.description: After repairs are performed, defective parts are disposed of or shipped to the manufacturer, depending on part return disposition recorded in the associated order.
processes.usedWhen: Defective, unused, or returned parts must be shipped or disposed of following repair.

processes.title: Spare Part Inventory
processes.description: On the first Friday of each month, spare parts are inventoried to ensure inventory records accurately reflect stock counts.
processes.usedWhen: Performing the scheduled monthly spare parts inventory audit.
